---
title: pandas
---

```{r, code=readLines("_knitr_config.R"), echo=FALSE}
```
```{css, code=readLines("_style.css"), echo=FALSE}
```

*********************************************************************

> Python Data Analysis Library

*********************************************************************

https://pandas.pydata.org/

*********************************************************************

## installation

```sh
conda install pandas
```

```{python, eval=TRUE}
import pandas as pd
pd.__version__
```

*********************************************************************

## data structures

### Series

> a one-dimensional labeled array capable of holding any data type

### DataFrame

> a two-dimensional labeled data structure with columns of potentially different types

*********************************************************************

## creation


```python

```

*********************************************************************

## indexing

*********************************************************************

## importing

### read_csv

### read_sql

```python
read_sql(query, con)
```
